# Anduril Industries Demonstrates Globally Distributed Command and Control Capabilities During INDOPACOM Exercise

Anduril Industries is honored to provide geographically distributed command and control capabilities during exercise Valiant Shield, a multinational, biennial field training exercise focused on integrating interoperability in a multi-domain environment to prepare the Joint and Combined Force.
